channel.title: Andrew Minga | Blog
channel.description: Azure, MSP automation, and AI tooling for IT operations. What actually worked, including the parts that didn't.

item.title: 🚀 We're Hiring: Microsoft Solutions Architect – Licensing & CSP Strategy | Bengaluru
item.description:
Microsoft licensing is getting harder to get right, and most MSPs are still guessing.
Samith Kumar Mahapatra is hiring a Microsoft Solutions Architect in Bengaluru focused specifically on CSP...

item.title: I feel like I do not understand computers and feel stupid working in IT
item.description:
Every senior IT pro I respect has a version of this story.
A thread on r/sysadmin this week went viral for one reason: honesty. Someone admitted they feel like they do not understand computers and...

item.title: Why fixing your data architecture matters more than upgrading your detection models
item.description:
Better detection models won't save you if the data feeding them is a mess.
A recent CSO Online piece makes the case directly: most security teams are investing in smarter AI and ML tooling while...

item.title: Building This Site with Claude Code
item.description: No framework, no build system, no CMS. Static HTML, one CSS file, and an AI pair that wrote most of it. What that workflow actually looks like and where the human judgment still lives.

item.title: How are you guys actually securing Claude / AI code tools? (E5/Purview shop)
item.description: Your developers are pasting sensitive code into Claude right now. Do you know where it's going? What E5/Purview shops actually have available for governing AI coding tools.
